## Description
Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- List key changes
- Describe the implementation approach
- Highlight important decisions

## Testing

### How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them.

### Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] I have added/updated tests as needed
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] No console errors or warnings

## Backend-Specific (if applicable)
- [ ] Database migrations included (if schema changes)
- [ ] API endpoints documented
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] Security considerations reviewed

### Database Changes
- [ ] No migrations needed
- [ ] Migration file(s) created in `backend/prisma/migrations/`
- [ ] Migration tested and reversible
- [ ] Updated `schema.prisma` accordingly

## Mobile-Specific (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on Android and iOS
- [ ] No console warnings or errors
- [ ] Performance checked (animations smooth, load times acceptable)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (touch targets, contrast)
- [ ] Responsive design verified
- [ ] EAS configuration updated (if needed)

### Expo-Specific Considerations
- [ ] Updated app.json if needed
- [ ] Module compatibility verified
- [ ] Native module requirements documented
- [ ] Tested with `expo start` locally

## Code Quality

### General Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] No hardcoded values (magic numbers, API keys, etc.)
- [ ] Error messages are user-friendly

### Security Checklist
- [ ] No sensitive data logged
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] No SQL injection vulnerabilities
- [ ] Dependencies audited (npm audit)

## Breaking Changes
If this is a breaking change, please describe:
- What changed
- How to migrate
- Timeline for removal (if applicable)

## Screenshots/Videos
Add screenshots or videos to help reviewers understand UI changes.

## Performance Impact
- [ ] No negative performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvement with metrics
- [ ] Describe any performance changes

## Additional Context
Add any other context, dependencies, or considerations here.

## Deployment Notes
- [ ] No database migrations required
- [ ] Environment variables needed
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
- [ ] Monitoring/alerts configured

## Reviewer Notes
Any specific areas you'd like reviewers to focus on?
